title: Veo Micromobility Contract Extension Held for Committee Meeting Pending Council Questions
summary: Request to extend existing Veo micromobility agreement held for committee meeting at council direction. Council wants Veo representatives to present statistics and answer constituent questions. Discussion about realigning contract dates from February cycle back to January/calendar year. Eric Annis (Chief Development Officer) presented on behalf of the administration.

political_signal.description: Council holds Veo contract extension for committee review, citing need for constituent input and vendor accountability
